agent_summaries.role_description: Internal ERP inventory and capacity analytics
agent_summaries.findings_summary: Analyzed 250 SKUs and identified 18 urgent restocks with exponential sales velocity and sub-2-month cover. Also flagged 31 dead-stock SKUs for clearance and confirmed 1.75M TND free budget with 1222.6 m3 available capacity.

Validated 5 trends via scraped engagement and live search: Gorpcore, Olive Cargo, Coquette growing; Quiet Luxury stable; Y2K declining. Recommended immediate restock of Olive Cargo (SKU-00250) and avoidance of Y2K new buys.
Found 60% local competitor stock-out for Olive Cargo Pants creating supply gap. Provided pricing band 85-109 TND. Informed strategic add of SKU-00250 to capture share.

recommendations.name: Tops/T-Shirt
recommendations.reasoning: Urgent restock: 0.63mo cover, top viral velocity 40.9% MoM growth.

recommendations.name: Bottoms/Jeans
recommendations.reasoning: Urgent restock: 0.85mo cover, exponential sales b=0.321.

recommendations.name: Dresses/Summer Dress
recommendations.reasoning: Urgent restock: 1.10mo cover, strong growth r2=0.991.

recommendations.name: Outerwear/Coat
recommendations.reasoning: Urgent restock: 1.05mo cover, validated winter trend.

recommendations.name: Accessories/Scarf
recommendations.reasoning: Urgent restock: 0.66mo cover, top accessory velocity.

recommendations.name: Bottoms/Cargo (Olive)
recommendations.reasoning: Strategic add due to 60% competitor stock-out and high trend engagement.

recommendations.name: Dead-Stock Clearance Lot
recommendations.reasoning: Liquidate 31 flat/declining SKUs with >6mo cover to free working capital.
